name: HWR_SOC_MED_RL_RAW_SCR_B
description: This table stores the raw score for the roles of the profiles in socila media

columns.Name: GBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the Global Profile Id of the consumer.

columns.Name: ROLE_ID_URI
columns.Comments: This stores the Role Id of the consumer

columns.Name: ACCURACY
columns.Comments: This stores the information about the Accuracy of the Score

columns.Name: IMPORTANCE
columns.Comments: This stores the information on the importance of the Raw Score

columns.Name: PRECISION
columns.Comments: This stores the information on the precision of the score

columns.Name: RELEVANCE
columns.Comments: This stores the relevance of the score.

columns.Name: SCORE_TIMESTAMP
columns.Comments: This stores information about the timestamp when the score is created

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
